evals.prompt: 把今天雷达第一篇论文做一下深入分析，但候选文件里只有摘要。
evals.expected_output: Writes an abstract-level analysis into the same daily brief and never claims full-text reading.

evals.prompt: 第一篇没有PDF，换第二篇给我精读吧。
evals.expected_output: Refuses silent substitution, explains the first-item rule, and offers abstract-level analysis or explicit user-directed scope change.

evals.prompt: 全文链接能打开，帮我总结方法、结果和对CI3的意义。
evals.expected_output: Reads the actual lawful full text before using the full-text label and separates reported results from relevance inference.
